quizQuestion:
Sans son interruption, {___} pendant une heure.
(Without her interruption, I would have spoken for an hour.)
sentenceTranslation: Without her interruption, I would have spoken for an hour.
explanation: j'aurais parlé — conditionnel passé: avoir au conditionnel présent (j'aurais) + participe passé (parlé). Expresses a counterfactual past event.

quizQuestion:
Avec plus de temps, {___} ce projet à l'heure.
(With more time, you would have finished this project on time.)
sentenceTranslation: With more time, you would have finished this project on time.
explanation: tu aurais fini — conditionnel passé: avoir au conditionnel présent (tu aurais) + participe passé (fini). Counterfactual past with -ir verb.

quizQuestion:
S'il avait su, {___} le train de six heures.
(If he had known, he would have taken the six o'clock train.)
sentenceTranslation: If he had known, he would have taken the six o'clock train.
explanation: il aurait pris — conditionnel passé of prendre (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (aurait) + participe passé irrégulier (pris).

quizQuestion:
Si nous avions été là, {___} la vérité.
(If we had been there, we would have told the truth.)
sentenceTranslation: If we had been there, we would have told the truth.
explanation: nous aurions dit — conditionnel passé of dire (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (aurions) + participe passé irrégulier (dit).

quizQuestion:
À ma place, {___} la même chose.
(In my place, you would have done the same thing.)
sentenceTranslation: In my place, you would have done the same thing.
explanation: vous auriez fait — conditionnel passé of faire (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (auriez) + participe passé irrégulier (fait).

quizQuestion:
Sans la grève, {___} la lettre à temps.
(Without the strike, they would have written the letter in time.)
sentenceTranslation: Without the strike, they would have written the letter in time.
explanation: ils auraient écrit — conditionnel passé of écrire (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (auraient) + participe passé irrégulier (écrit).

quizQuestion:
Si elle avait été attentive, {___} l'erreur tout de suite.
(If she had been attentive, she would have seen the mistake right away.)
sentenceTranslation: If she had been attentive, she would have seen the mistake right away.
explanation: elle aurait vu — conditionnel passé of voir (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (aurait) + participe passé irrégulier (vu).

quizQuestion:
Avec de meilleures conditions, {___} l'examen.
(With better conditions, I would have passed the exam.)
sentenceTranslation: With better conditions, I would have passed the exam.
explanation: j'aurais réussi — conditionnel passé of réussir. Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (j'aurais) + participe passé (réussi). Regular -ir verb.

quizQuestion:
Si on lui avait expliqué, {___} tout de suite.
(If someone had explained it to her, she would have understood right away.)
sentenceTranslation: If someone had explained it to her, she would have understood right away.
explanation: elle aurait compris — conditionnel passé of comprendre (irrég., like prendre). Auxiliary avoir (aurait) + participe passé irrégulier (compris).

quizQuestion:
C'est ce que {___}.
(This is what I would have said.)
sentenceTranslation: This is what I would have said.
explanation: j'aurais dit — conditionnel passé of dire (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir (j'aurais) + participe passé irrégulier (dit). Classic counterfactual statement.

quizQuestion:
Sans ton aide {___}.
(But for your help, I would have failed.)
sentenceTranslation: But for your help, I would have failed.
explanation: j'aurais échoué — conditionnel passé of échouer. Regular -er verb: auxiliary avoir (j'aurais) + participe passé (échoué).

quizQuestion:
Si j'avais eu le temps, {___} au marché ce matin.
(If I had had time, I would have gone to the market this morning.)
sentenceTranslation: If I had had time, I would have gone to the market this morning.
explanation: je serais allé(e) — conditionnel passé with être: auxiliary être au conditionnel (je serais) + participe passé (allé/allée). Aller takes être as auxiliary.

quizQuestion:
Sans ce problème, {___} hier.
(Without this problem, you would have left yesterday.)
sentenceTranslation: Without this problem, you would have left yesterday.
explanation: tu serais parti(e) — conditionnel passé with être: auxiliary être au conditionnel (tu serais) + participe passé (parti/partie). Agreement with subject gender.

quizQuestion:
Si tu l'avais invitée, {___} à la fête.
(If you had invited her, she would have come to the party.)
sentenceTranslation: If you had invited her, she would have come to the party.
explanation: elle serait venue — conditionnel passé of venir with être. Feminine subject: participe passé agrees → venue (not venu). Venir always takes être.

quizQuestion:
Si le concert avait fini à l'heure, {___} avant minuit.
(If the concert had ended on time, we would have returned before midnight.)
sentenceTranslation: If the concert had ended on time, we would have returned before midnight.
explanation: nous serions rentrés — conditionnel passé of rentrer with être. Plural masculine/mixed: participe passé takes plural form (rentrés).

quizQuestion:
S'ils n'avaient pas eu d'embouteillage, {___} à l'heure.
(If they had not been stuck in traffic, they would have arrived on time.)
sentenceTranslation: If they had not been stuck in traffic, they would have arrived on time.
explanation: ils seraient arrivés — conditionnel passé of arriver with être. Masculine plural subject: participe passé agrees → arrivés.

quizQuestion:
Sans ce problème au travail, {___} en France cet été.
(Without this problem at work, she would have returned to France this summer.)
sentenceTranslation: Without this problem at work, she would have returned to France this summer.
explanation: elle serait retournée — conditionnel passé of retourner with être. Feminine singular: participe passé agrees → retournée.

quizQuestion:
Par ce beau temps, {___} plus tôt.
(In this nice weather, you would have gone out earlier.)
sentenceTranslation: In this nice weather, you would have gone out earlier.
explanation: vous seriez sortis — conditionnel passé of sortir with être. Plural or formal vous: participe passé takes plural form (sortis/sorties).

quizQuestion:
Si ses parents avaient déménagé, {___} à Paris.
(If his parents had moved, he would have been born in Paris.)
sentenceTranslation: If his parents had moved, he would have been born in Paris.
explanation: il serait né — conditionnel passé of naître with être. Naître always takes être. Masculine singular: participe passé né (no agreement marker).

quizQuestion:
Sans l'alarme, {___} trop tard.
(Without the alarm, I would have gotten up too late.)
sentenceTranslation: Without the alarm, I would have gotten up too late.
explanation: je me serais levé(e) — conditionnel passé of pronominal se lever. Pronominal verbs always use être: je me serais + participe passé. Gender agreement applies.

quizQuestion:
Sans la pluie, {___} différemment pour la cérémonie.
(Without the rain, she would have dressed differently for the ceremony.)
sentenceTranslation: Without the rain, she would have dressed differently for the ceremony.
explanation: elle se serait habillée — conditionnel passé of pronominal s'habiller with être. Feminine subject: participe passé agrees → habillée.

quizQuestion:
Sans ce film, {___} plus tôt.
(Without that film, we would have gone to bed earlier.)
sentenceTranslation: Without that film, we would have gone to bed earlier.
explanation: nous nous serions couchés — conditionnel passé of pronominal se coucher with être. Plural: participe passé couchés (masculine/mixed) or couchées (all-feminine).

quizQuestion:
{___} travailler plus s'il voulait réussir.
(He should have worked harder if he wanted to succeed.)
sentenceTranslation: He should have worked harder if he wanted to succeed.
grammarPointLabel: devoir (il) — Conditionnel passé modal: obligation non remplie
explanation: il aurait dû — conditionnel passé of devoir. Auxiliary avoir (aurait) + participe passé (dû). Expresses 'he should have' — a past moral obligation that was not met.

quizQuestion:
{___} te présenter avant de commencer.
(You should have introduced yourself before starting.)
sentenceTranslation: You should have introduced yourself before starting.
explanation: tu aurais dû — conditionnel passé of devoir. Expresses 'you should have' — a past obligation not fulfilled.

quizQuestion:
{___} me déconnecter avant de sauvegarder.
(I shouldn't have logged off before saving.)
sentenceTranslation: I shouldn't have logged off before saving.
grammarPointLabel: devoir (je négatif) — Conditionnel passé modal négatif
explanation: je n'aurais pas dû — negated conditionnel passé of devoir. Negation wraps the auxiliary: ne...pas around aurais. Expresses regret for an action taken.

quizQuestion:
{___} voir l'exposition — elle était magnifique !
(You ought to have seen the exhibition — it was magnificent!)
sentenceTranslation: You ought to have seen the exhibition — it was magnificent!
grammarPointLabel: devoir (tu) — Conditionnel passé modal: conseil rétrospectif
explanation: tu aurais dû — conditionnel passé of devoir. Also rendered as 'you ought to have' — expressing a missed opportunity the speaker regrets on the listener's behalf.

quizQuestion:
{___} le faire toi-même — ce n'était pas compliqué.
(You could have done it yourself — it wasn't complicated.)
sentenceTranslation: You could have done it yourself — it wasn't complicated.
grammarPointLabel: pouvoir (tu) — Conditionnel passé modal: capacité non utilisée
explanation: tu aurais pu — conditionnel passé of pouvoir. Expresses 'you could have' — an unrealized past ability or possibility.

quizQuestion:
Avec une meilleure organisation, {___} éviter ces problèmes.
(With better organisation, we could have avoided these problems.)
sentenceTranslation: With better organisation, we could have avoided these problems.
explanation: nous aurions pu — conditionnel passé of pouvoir. Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (aurions) + participe passé irrégulier (pu). 'We could have'.

quizQuestion:
{___} être là pour te soutenir.
(I would have wanted to be there to support you.)
sentenceTranslation: I would have wanted to be there to support you.
grammarPointLabel: vouloir (je) — Conditionnel passé modal: souhait non réalisé
explanation: j'aurais voulu — conditionnel passé of vouloir. Expresses 'I would have wanted' — a past desire that could not be fulfilled.

quizQuestion:
{___} venir à la fête mais ils étaient malades.
(They would have wanted to come to the party but they were ill.)
sentenceTranslation: They would have wanted to come to the party but they were ill.
explanation: ils auraient voulu — conditionnel passé of vouloir. Auxiliary avoir (auraient) + participe passé (voulu). Unrealized past wish.

quizQuestion:
{___} être un oiseau.
(I wish I were a bird. / I would have liked to be a bird.)
sentenceTranslation: I wish I were a bird.
grammarPointLabel: aimer (je) — Conditionnel passé modal: souhait impossible
explanation: j'aurais aimé — conditionnel passé of aimer. Expresses an impossible or unfulfilled wish about the past. Regular -er verb with auxiliary avoir.

quizQuestion:
{___} voir le film avec vous mais je travaillais.
(I would have liked to see the film with you but I was working.)
sentenceTranslation: I would have liked to see the film with you but I was working.
explanation: j'aurais aimé — conditionnel passé of aimer used to express a missed wish. Common polite or regretful expression in spoken and written French.

quizQuestion:
{___} avoir une meilleure mémoire.
(I wish I had a better memory.)
sentenceTranslation: I wish I had a better memory.
grammarPointLabel: aimer (je) — Conditionnel passé modal: souhait contrefactuel
explanation: j'aurais aimé — conditionnel passé of aimer. Used for a counterfactual wish about a personal trait, equivalent to 'I wish I had…'.

quizQuestion:
{___} être plus grand pour jouer au basket.
(I wish I were taller to play basketball.)
sentenceTranslation: I wish I were taller to play basketball.
grammarPointLabel: aimer (je) — Conditionnel passé: souhait physique impossible
explanation: j'aurais aimé — conditionnel passé of aimer expressing a wish about an unchangeable physical trait. Common register in French for unfulfillable desires.

quizQuestion:
{___} rester à la maison plutôt que d'aller à cette réunion.
(She would have preferred to stay home rather than go to that meeting.)
sentenceTranslation: She would have preferred to stay home rather than go to that meeting.
grammarPointLabel: préférer (elle) — Conditionnel passé modal: préférence non réalisée
explanation: elle aurait préféré — conditionnel passé of préférer. Regular pattern: auxiliary avoir (aurait) + participe passé (préféré). Expresses a past preference that didn't happen.

quizQuestion:
{___} me le dire plus tôt — j'aurais pu aider.
(You should have told me sooner — I could have helped.)
sentenceTranslation: You should have told me sooner — I could have helped.
explanation: vous auriez dû — conditionnel passé of devoir. Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (auriez) + participe passé (dû). 'You should have' to a formal or plural addressee.

quizQuestion:
{___} partir plus tôt pour éviter les bouchons.
(It would have been necessary to leave earlier to avoid the traffic jams.)
sentenceTranslation: It would have been necessary to leave earlier to avoid the traffic jams.
explanation: il aurait fallu — conditionnel passé of impersonal falloir. Always il (impersonal subject). Expresses 'it would have been necessary to' — a past necessity not fulfilled.

quizQuestion:
{___} investir davantage dans l'éducation.
(It would have been necessary to invest more in education.)
sentenceTranslation: It would have been necessary to invest more in education.
explanation: il aurait fallu — conditionnel passé impersonnel. Used in formal or political discourse to express a past necessity that was not met, often with a critical or regretful tone.

quizQuestion:
Selon des sources proches du dossier, le président {___} vouloir démissionner.
(According to sources close to the matter, the president allegedly declared that he wants to resign.)
sentenceTranslation: According to sources close to the matter, the president allegedly declared that he wants to resign.
grammarPointLabel: déclarer — Conditionnel passé: style journalistique (information non confirmée)
explanation: aurait déclaré — conditionnel passé used in journalism to report unconfirmed information. Known as le conditionnel journalistique — signals the speaker does not vouch for the facts.

quizQuestion:
D'après nos informations, le ministre {___} un accord secret hier soir.
(According to our information, the minister allegedly signed a secret agreement last night.)
sentenceTranslation: According to our information, the minister allegedly signed a secret agreement last night.
explanation: aurait signé — conditionnel passé journalistique. Used with verbs of action to report unverified news without committing to its truth. Equivalent to 'allegedly' in English press.

quizQuestion:
Selon les syndicats, la direction {___} plus de deux cents employés sans préavis.
(According to the unions, management allegedly dismissed over two hundred employees without notice.)
sentenceTranslation: According to the unions, management allegedly dismissed over two hundred employees without notice.
explanation: aurait licencié — conditionnel passé journalistique. The speaker reports an allegation (syndicats as source) without confirming it. This distancing use is a key B2 register feature.

quizQuestion:
Si j'avais connu ton numéro, {___} t'appeler directement.
(If I had known your number, I could have called you directly.)
sentenceTranslation: If I had known your number, I could have called you directly.
grammarPointLabel: pouvoir (je) — Conditionnel passé modal: possibilité non réalisée
explanation: j'aurais pu — conditionnel passé of pouvoir in type-3 conditional: si + plus-que-parfait → conditionnel passé. 'I could have'.

quizQuestion:
Si tu m'avais envoyé un message, {___} ta réponse à temps.
(If you had sent me a message, I would have received your reply in time.)
sentenceTranslation: If you had sent me a message, I would have received your reply in time.
explanation: j'aurais reçu — conditionnel passé of recevoir (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir (j'aurais) + participe passé irrégulier (reçu). Part of a type-3 conditional structure.

quizQuestion:
Sans la pandémie, {___} le projet en œuvre dès janvier.
(Without the pandemic, they would have implemented the project from January.)
sentenceTranslation: Without the pandemic, they would have implemented the project from January.
explanation: ils auraient mis — conditionnel passé of mettre (irrég.). Auxiliary avoir (auraient) + participe passé irrégulier (mis). Expresses a counterfactual past action.

quizQuestion:
Si tu lui avais rappelé, {___} du rendez-vous.
(If you had reminded him, he would have remembered the appointment.)
sentenceTranslation: If you had reminded him, he would have remembered the appointment.
explanation: il se serait souvenu — conditionnel passé of pronominal se souvenir (always pronominal). Uses être as auxiliary. Masculine subject: no agreement marking on souvenu.

quizQuestion:
Sans les restrictions, {___} le restaurant dès le printemps.
(Without the restrictions, we would have opened the restaurant from spring.)
sentenceTranslation: Without the restrictions, we would have opened the restaurant from spring.
explanation: nous aurions ouvert — conditionnel passé of ouvrir (irrég.). Participe passé is ouvert (not *ouvri). Auxiliary avoir au conditionnel (aurions).
